| | | | Peter, It's no surprise that the liberal media tried to create a false narrative to try to slow down Marco's campaign in the final days before today's primary. **But it 's not working: Americans are hearing our campaign's conservative message and are standing up proudly with us.** **In fact, yesterday, Rush Limbaugh praised Marco at length for standing up and telling the truth about President Obama: that he 's trying to change America, for the worse.** We've seen huge increases in support over just the past few days, and it's because Americans aren't buying into the ridiculous spin from some pundits in the media. Even as the media has tried to write Marco off, a new poll released yesterday had Marco building support in New Hampshire, **moving ahead** of the candidates who attacked him on Saturday night (and who've spent most of their campaigns in the state). _**Here 's why so many people are joining us:**_ --> We are the only campaign who is exposing President Obama for his deliberate actions to destroy our country. --> We are the only campaign with 21st Century conservative solutions to the very critical issues facing our nation.--> We are the only campaign who is pushing back on ridiculous liberal media narratives. **And Marco is the only candidate who will unite conservatives and defeat Hillary Clinton next fall.** Americans have heard our message loud and clear: If you want a president who will undo the wrongs caused by President Obama and take our great nation into a New American Century, you've got to stand with us today. Peter, the media knows Marco is the best candidate to defeat Hillary and they are doing everything in their power to stop us. But we've got a secret weapon that they don't know about: YOU. They think telling the truth about President Obama to as many voters as possible is going to make me lose support -- I know it's the opposite. [**Voters are hitting the polls in New Hampshire right now, and your donation could be the one helps us maintain our momentum after the results tonight. Will you stand with our campaign right now?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/46130647:JeF6RHrfN:m:1:1349778030:42A48FDA89D4E1768DB19ED8C901B06B:r) Alex ConantCommunications DirectorMarco Rubio for President

body:

| | | | Peter, I know everyone is going to be focused on the results tonight, and so will I, but I wanted to take a moment to say thank you! This campaign hasn't always been easy, and I know the attacks against Marco will only increase, but your support and kindness along the way have made it all worth it. The kids and I have loved every day of this campaign. We've been able to meet wonderful supporters like you and visit beautiful towns and vibrant cities across our country. Our family continues to enjoy so many new experiences throughout this campaign. Once again, thank you for all that you do and for [**your support!**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/46139337:JX51bhrQN:m:1:1349778030:9BE384D79B90BFB57064811F3E029F09:r) In fact, the kids got to do something extra special this weekend: build snowmen!

And I believe when you speak to Marco one-on-one, you 'll know firsthand the man I know.** As we continue to travel the country and meet every voter, our goal is to personally meet you! But until then, I hope you take my word for it. [**Peter, Marco is running for president to restore our nation and expand the American Dream. We need Marco in the White House, but it will only happen if he has your continued support right now.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/46139337:JX51bhrQN:m:1:1349778030:9BE384D79B90BFB57064811F3E029F09:r) I hope you will stand with me in supporting Marco and watching the results tonight. name: Joe Sestak
subject: Safe water, whether it's Flint MI or PA fracking
body:
[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719061/3476a20e/c5c9dd2/27452bd2/3680876993/VEsH/ "http://joesestak.com")
---

Peter, Real leadership is stopping a crisis _from_ happening, not just responding to the crisis _when_ it happens - unlike Flint, where government "leaders" ignored the people's lead-filled drinking water until it became a public crisis. **It 's why I was for a moratorium on Marcellus shale fracking in 2010 - and remain so today. ** | [](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719061/3476a20e/c5c9dd2/27452bd1/3680876993/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/admiraljoesestak-web?refcode=16EM0209FBb1&amounts=25,50,100,150,250,500,1000")
---
* In Flint, Michigan, authorities assured residents for two years that their water was safe to drink despite discoloration and sickness.
* In PA, authorities have allowed methane and multiple fracking chemicals to plague our drinking water for a decade despite warnings.
* In Flint, public "leaders" let General Motors change to a safe water supply - but not the people.
* In PA, public "leaders" have exempted gas companies' fracking from drinking water regulation - rather than providing oversight to ensure the people's water does not become polluted.

People should not have to worry about:
* the safety of their drinking water, whether contaminated with lead or fracking chemicals
* having leaders stand tall for the people, not the powers behind the water's pollution

[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719061/3476a20e/c5c9dd2/27452bd0/3680876993/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/admiraljoesestak-web?refcode=16EM0209FBb2&amounts=25,50,100,150,250,500,1000")
---
In the Senate, I will stand for people above power.
Please contribute to my campaign today to send a leader to the Senate who was trained for 31 years in the Navy on how to stand tall - and avoid crises _before_ they occur.

[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719061/3476a20e/c5c9dd2/27452bdf/3680876993/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/admiraljoesestak-web?refcode=16EM0209FBb3&amounts=25,50,100,150,250,500,1000")
---
Warmly,
Joe

name: Bill Clinton
subject: ''What are we going to do?''
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by hundreds of thousands of grassroots donors
body:
I didn't do this -- she did. | Friend --

I've studied all of our previous presidents, and found that the folks who hold this office tend to be intelligent and hardworking, and honestly try to do what they say they're going to do. But there's a big difference between those who can actually make things happen and those who can't.

Hillary is the most qualified person for this moment. She's got big ideas and the know-how and grit to implement them. You're entitled to give that statement the love discount if you want, but I believe it with all my heart. **[If you believe it, too, I hope you'll chip in $1 now to help Hillary out. She's in a tough fight in New Hampshire, and she needs you with her as voters head to the polls today.](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjQ2NzkyMDcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQxNTA0OTcyS0&mt=1&rt=0)**

Hillary's not just a change talker, she's a changemaker. Here's a story you may not know: When I was governor of Arkansas, our state had six of the poorest counties in America. And Hillary told me how worried she was: "We've got all these kids starting school and their parents can't read -- they'll never catch up. But I read about this program in Israel for new immigrants who teach the parents to become their children's first teachers. I think it would work here."

"Great," I told her. "What are we going to do?"

"Oh, I called the woman who started it. She'll be here in ten days, and we're going to start the program."

Next thing I know, I'm going to graduations for preschoolers all across the state -- and then it's in 26 states, and it's still thriving.

I didn't do that. She did that. She hadn't been elected to anything -- she just made something good happen. There are thousands of people in this country today who have better lives, learned more and grew up ready to succeed, just because she's always cared enough to help the people around her.

I know Hillary is going to be an incredible president, and we need her. But I'll tell you what else -- she needs us. She's in a real fight for this nomination -- she's being outraised and outspent, and she needs her whole team to step up and stand with her. **Do that today. All it takes is $1, and you could make a difference for her, just like she always has for us:** [ | | [**Donate $1**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjQ2NzkyMDcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQxNTA0OTcyS0&mt=1&rt=0)

Thanks,

Bill

subject: No matter what happens tonight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by hundreds of thousands of grassroots donors
body:
Why they outspent us 3-to-1 | Friend --

I'm so proud of the work this team has done leading up to today's New Hampshire primary. There have been thousands of volunteers trekking through the snow, thousands more from all over the country making phone calls to turn out voters, and supporters like you chipping in $1 to keep our operation going -- I'm so grateful.

The Sanders campaign knows how strong this team is -- that's why they went to the extraordinary measure of outspending us on the airwaves 3-to-1 here in New Hampshire.

**Let's prove that we're a force to be reckoned with, and that whatever happens tonight, we're ready to get back out there and fight twice as hard tomorrow. All it takes is $1 to show you’re with me:**

name: Jonathan McConnell
subject: His days are numbered
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Jonathan McConnell
body:
| Friend --

Over the last 37 years Shelby has been in Washington, our national debt has increased from $700 billion to over $19 trillion. Despite earning just a government salary for nearly four decades, his personal wealth has grown -- massively -- as he has shuttled at least $250 million in government earmarks to his former staffers. But when he‘s campaigning for re-election, all you’ll hear are empty promises about getting spending under control and reigning in the national debt.

It’s true: Shelby has a proven record -- as a campaign conservative and an Establishment senator.

Our campaign is about bringing a new generation of leadership to Washington. It’s time to put an end to self-dealing ways of Washington politicians, and refocus on serving “We, the People.” That’s why I’ve signed a term limits pledge, because public office is a public trust -- not a way to get rich or funnel taxpayer money to your friends.

Shelby’s campaign says we have term limits -- they’re called elections -- and if voters aren’t happy with his record they can vote him out. I say yes we can, and yes we will!

**[If you’re with us in this fight, then add your name and send a message to Shelby that his days of getting rich on the taxpayer’s dime are numbered.](http://www.mcconnell2016.com/shelbys_days_are_numbered?e=92249b206344e4c5e978546dc4ae2bbd&utm_source=mcconnell&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20160209_s&n=1)**

Jonathan

clean_body: | Friend -- Over the last 37 years Shelby has been in Washington, our national debt has increased from $700 billion to over $19 trillion. Despite earning just a government salary for nearly four decades, his personal wealth has grown -- massively -- as he has shuttled at least $250 million in government earmarks to his former staffers. But when he‘s campaigning for re-election, all you’ll hear are empty promises about getting spending under control and reigning in the national debt. It’s true: Shelby has a proven record -- as a campaign conservative and an Establishment senator. Our campaign is about bringing a new generation of leadership to Washington. It’s time to put an end to self-dealing ways of Washington politicians, and refocus on serving “We, the People.” That’s why I’ve signed a term limits pledge, because public office is a public trust -- not a way to get rich or funnel taxpayer money to your friends. Shelby’s campaign says we have term limits -- they’re called elections -- and if voters aren’t happy with his record they can vote him out. I say yes we can, and yes we will! Jonathan Paid for by Friends of Jonathan McConnell

subject: My next steps

body:
| | | | | | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/46145785:JGdsHhr1N:m:1:1349778030:9B347AAC7FD877172743FA6A8E64B926:r)
---
| | | | Peter, On Saturday night at the debate, I dropped the ball. I want you to know that will _**never**_ happen again. We are heading to South Carolina, Nevada and beyond. Make no mistake: **We are going to win this nomination.** Throughout my life, I've known tough times. In New Hampshire tonight, I told the story of how when I was young, at one point, my father lost his job as an apartment manager and my family had to move out of our Miami apartment, all in the same week. He had to move clear across the country to Las Vegas to look for work, and the job he finally found, after 20 years as a bartender who'd finally moved his way up a bit, had him starting from scratch again as a busboy. **I know how to come from behind. We 're going to show America what leadership and a vision for a New American Century look like.** Peter, if you heard what Bernie Sanders and Hillary Clinton said tonight, you know the stakes: If one of them wins this fall, they will keep up President Obama's efforts to change our country beyond recognition. I shudder to think what another eight years of President Obama's liberal leadership and lawless actions will look like. **Peter, this is our chance to ensure that doesn 't happen.** I am the only conservative candidate who can unite our party and beat Hillary Clinton or Bernie Sanders this fall. If you want a Republican White House next year instead, with the ideas we need to restore America in the 21st Century, then I need your support. Again, this is just the beginning. I hope I'll have [_**your support**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/46145785:JGdsHhr1N:m:1:1349778030:9B347AAC7FD877172743FA6A8E64B926:r) as we continue this journey. Marco
